name: Tarragon-Mustard Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the tarragon and vinegar together.
2. Blend in the mustard.
3. Add the salt and pepper, blending well.
4. Incorporate the mayonnaise into the mixture.
5. Finally, add the sour cream and blend until smooth.
6. Cover and chill.
7. Makes about 1 1/2 cups of dip.
8. Suggested dippers: Chicken Strips or Cubes, Shrimp, Asparagus, Onion Crackers
